scheme_name: Assistance to the Fishermen for Purchase of Fisheries Requisites
page_title: Assistance to the Fishermen for Purchase of Fisheries Requisites

details: The scheme “Assistance to the Fishermen for Purchase of Fisheries Requisites” has been implemented by the Department of Fisheries, UT Administration of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu. The scheme aims to provide one-time financial assistance in the form of a subsidy for the purchase of essential fisheries-related equipment, including support for the installation of IBM engines, procurement of electrical or solar equipment, and the purchase of insulated ice boxes for fish storage.
benefits: Installation of Inboard Motor (IBM) Engine through Bank Loan
For engine cost up to ₹1,00,000/-: 20% subsidy, a maximum of ₹20,000/-.
For engine cost up to ₹3,00,000/-: 15% subsidy, a maximum of ₹45,000/-.
The subsidy is applicable only when the IBM engine is installed through a bank loan.
For equipment cost up to ₹40,000/-: 50% subsidy, a maximum of ₹20,000/-.
Insulated Ice Boxes for Fish Storage
For fisherwomen: 75% subsidy, a maximum of ₹6,000/-.
For boat owners: 50% subsidy, a maximum of ₹15,000/-.
eligibility: The applicant must be a resident of the Union Territory of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu.
The applicant must be a fisherman.

offline: The applicant should contact the respective District Panchayat/Fisheries Department, UT Administration of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu to avail the benefits under the scheme.

faqs.question: What is the purpose of the scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme provides financial assistance to fishermen, fisherwomen, and boat owners for the purchase of fisheries requisites.

faqs.question: Who implements the scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme is implemented by the Fisheries Department.

faqs.question: Where should applicants contact for applying to the scheme?
faqs.answer: Applicants should contact the District Panchaya.

faqs.question: What assistance is available for installation of an Inboard Motor (IBM) engine?
faqs.answer: Subsidy is provided for the installation of an IBM engine through a bank loan, subject to prescribed cost limits and subsidy ceilings.

faqs.question: What is the maximum subsidy available for an IBM engine costing up to ₹1,00,000/-?
faqs.answer: A subsidy of 20% of the cost is available, subject to a maximum of ₹20,000/-.

faqs.question: What subsidy is provided for electrical or solar equipment?
faqs.answer: A subsidy of 50% of the cost is available, subject to a maximum of ₹20,000/- for equipment costing up to ₹40,000/-.

faqs.question: What benefit is available for insulated ice boxes for fish storage?
faqs.answer: Subsidy is provided for insulated ice boxes for fish storage for eligible beneficiaries.

faqs.question: Is there any special benefit for fisherwomen under the scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, fisherwomen are eligible for a higher subsidy of 75% for insulated ice boxes, subject to a maximum of ₹6,000/-.
